title: Deploy/Setup Event Handlers Analysis
description: Analysis of Deploy, Setup, Bipod, and MountWeapon systems in Menace tactical combat

0x16f.name: isHeavyWeaponDeployed
0x16f.description: Flag indicating whether a heavy weapon (MG, mortar, etc) is currently deployed/set up

0xD0.name: currentStance
0xD0.description: Current stance of the actor, affects heavy weapon deployment

0x20.name: elements
0x20.description: List of Element components attached to this Actor

SetHeavyWeaponDeployed.description: Sets the isHeavyWeaponDeployed flag at offset 0x16f

IsHeavyWeaponDeployed.description: Returns the deployed state flag from offset 0x16f

SetStance.description: Sets actor stance. When returning to standing (0), clears isHeavyWeaponDeployed flag

Menace.Tactical.HeavyWeaponComp.description: Component managing heavy weapon visual state and animations

.ctor.description: Constructor. Sets HasHeavyWeapon animator bool, hides SHOULDER attachment point (5)

VisuallyDeployHeavyWeapon.description: Handles visual deployment. Calls DeployWeapon on ElementAttachments, sets animator deployed state

VisuallyPickHeavyWeapon.description: Visual pickup after undeploy. Sets PickingUp animator bool, toggles attachment point visibility

OnAttachHeavyWeapon.description: Called when heavy weapon attached. Restores to BIPOD attachment point (3)

OnStanceChanged.description: Handles stance changes. Standing hides weapon, Prone shows SHOULDER point, hides BIPOD

Menace.Tactical.ElementAttachments.description: Manages attachment points for equipment on tactical elements

0x30.name: deployedWeaponTransform
0x30.description: Reference to currently deployed weapon's transform (null when not deployed)

0x38-0x40.name: savedLocalPosition
0x38-0x40.description: Saved local position of weapon before deployment

0x44-0x50.name: savedLocalRotation
0x44-0x50.description: Saved local rotation of weapon before deployment

DeployWeapon.description: Deploys weapon visually by reparenting to world. Saves original transform for pickup. Uses BIPOD attachment point (3)

PickupDeployedWeapon.description: Restores deployed weapon to original attachment. Clears deployedWeaponTransform reference

GetAttachmentPoint.description: Returns AttachmentPoint for given slot type

Menace.Tactical.AttachmentPoint.description: Represents a point where equipment can be attached

SetAttachmentsVisibility.description: Sets active state on all attached GameObjects

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.DeployHea.description: Skill event handler for deploying heavy weapons

IsUsable.description: Checks if Deploy skill is usable. Requires: HasHeavyWeapon, NOT deployed, stance==CROUCH(1)

OnUse.signature: void OnUse(Actor actor, object context, ref bool success)
OnUse.description: Triggered when Deploy skill used. Sets isHeavyWeaponDeployed=true, calls VisuallyDeployHeavyWeapon

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.DeployHea.description: Skill effect definition for deploying heavy weapons

AddEventHandler.description: Registers handler at index, sets appropriate flags

Menace.Tactical.AI.SkillBehavior.description: AI behavior for using skills including deploy/setup combinations

0x4d.name: canSetup
0x4d.description: Flag indicating enough AP for setup after deploy

0x4e.name: canFire
0x4e.description: Flag indicating enough AP for firing

0x50.name: needsMoreAP
0x50.description: Flag indicating not enough AP for full combo

HandleDeployAndSetup.description: AI handler for deploy+setup skill combo. Calculates AP costs, sets behavior flags

OnExecute.description: Executes deployment movement. Returns false if already deployed (0x167)

Menace.Strategy.ModularVehicleSystem.description: System for mounting weapons on modular vehicles

MountWeapon.signature: void MountWeapon(object param, ItemsModularVehicle vehicle, ItemsModularVehicle_Slot slot)
MountWeapon.description: Mounts weapon to vehicle slot. Validates template, attaches prefab, collects muzzles/animators

VisuallyMountWeapons.description: Iterates all vehicle slots, mounts weapons, collects AnimatorParameters, checks twin-fire

Menace.Strategy.BattlePlan.description: Manages deployment of units to tactical missions

DeployEntities.description: Deploys units from battle plan. Creates UnitActors at deployment zones or nearby tiles

Menace.Tactical.HeavyWeaponAimComp.description: Component handling aiming for deployed heavy weapons

0x10.name: muzzleDirection
0x10.description: Reference to muzzle direction data from actor

0x20.name: elementAnimator
0x20.description: Reference to animator for aim direction

Create.description: Factory method. Gets BIPOD attachment (3), stores weapon transform. Returns null if no attachment

SetAimTarget.description: Sets aim target position. Calculates rotation angle and duration based on muzzle rotation rate

AttachmentPointType.description: Types of attachment points for equipment (VisualAlterationSlot)

Stance.description: Actor stance values stored at Actor+0xD0

values.0: Standing - Heavy weapon cannot be deployed
values.1: Crouching - Heavy weapon can be deployed
values.2: Prone - Special handling for heavy weapons

deployHeavyWeapon.description: Flow when player deploys a heavy weapon
steps: 1. DeployHeavyWeaponHandler.IsUsable checks: HasHeavyWeapon, not deployed, stance==CROUCH
3. Gets Element from Actor, then HeavyWeaponComp from Element
6. Weapon transform reparented to TacticalManager (world space)
7. Animator bools set for deployed state

pickupHeavyWeapon.description: Flow when player picks up deployed heavy weapon
steps: 6. Weapon reparented back to BIPOD attachment point

aiDeployBehavior.description: AI decision flow for deploying heavy weapons
steps: 2. Checks deploy skill at 0x20, setup at 0x30, fire at 0x40
5. Deploy.OnExecute moves actor to target tile
6. AI proceeds with deploy/setup/fire based on available AP

vehicleWeaponMount.description: Flow for mounting weapons on vehicles
steps: 2. Clears existing muzzles and animator lists
4. For each slot with item, calls MountWeapon

animatorParameters.description: Animator parameters used by ElementAnimator for heavy weapons

HasHeavyWeapon.description: Set when heavy weapon is equipped

Deployed.description: Set when heavy weapon is deployed

AimDirection.description: Aim direction for heavy weapon rotation (-1 or 1)

ghidraComments.description: Comments added to Ghidra decompiler for key functions

summary.description: Analysis summary of Deploy/Setup EventHandlers in Menace
keyFindings: Heavy weapon deployment is controlled by Actor.isHeavyWeaponDeployed flag at offset 0x16f
Deployment requires CROUCH stance (value 1) and is cleared when returning to STAND (value 0)
Two attachment points are used: BIPOD (3) for deployed weapons, SHOULDER (5) for carried weapons
DeployHeavyWeaponHandler is the skill event handler that triggers deployment
HeavyWeaponComp manages visual state through ElementAnimator parameters
ElementAttachments saves/restores weapon transform during deploy/pickup
AI uses SkillBehavior.HandleDeployAndSetup to manage deploy+setup+fire skill combos
Vehicle weapon mounting uses ModularVehicleSystem with separate slot management
